reviews.author: Sherwin Jose Cuya
reviews.text: Ryan replaced my entire garage door. I called him on a Wednesday and he came on a Saturday and got it fixed right away (though it is winter time). He is fast, very efficient, very professional. He is also a very nice guy, and easy to deal with. I will definitely recommend him to my friends and family. I love my new garage.

reviews.author: Kendra Green
reviews.text: Ryan was fast, honest and went above and beyond! My garage door broke and the weather was horrible. Ryan worked in 2 degree temp to get it done and was very kind and honest! Would use again!

reviews.author: bhavik damania
reviews.text: My house garage door spring broke. I got a reference for Ryan Garage and would say I got the best reference. Badru and his teammate were very friendly and professional and fixed my garage door within an hour! He also recommended upgrading the rollers. Highly recommend them for garage door service!

reviews.author: Frank Halek
reviews.text: I contacted Ryan to balance my 35-year-old steel sectional door which I believe caused my opener to fail. These guys were fantastic — they balanced the door and made me a very reasonable offer to install a brand new Genie opener. It only took about an hour. They saved me money and aggravation. I would definitely recommend them.

reviews.author: Grace Goodwin
reviews.text: Very pleased today. For garage door maintenance, Ryan performed thorough upkeep — springs, rollers, balance checked, lubrication, sensor tested. The door runs smoothly now, quiet and secure. Professional service, on-time, fair pricing. Would hire again. 👍

reviews.author: Andrew Stack
reviews.text: Badru and his team are top notch. Fast, responsive, and knowledgeable. Prices are great and he will solve your garage door problems or get you squared away with a new install when needed. Looking forward to working with him again!

reviews.author: Gerry Diaz
reviews.text: Ryan set up an appointment, gave an arrival time, and when running late messaged with an apology and a new ETA — which he made. Within 15 seconds he knew the issue but politely let me tell my story. He quoted all the work up front and fixed it on the first idea. Handled very professionally! Recommend 100%.

reviews.author: daniel calhoun
reviews.text: Ryan installed two openers for us. Very experienced and professional. He explained all the functions, programmed all the remotes and both keypads, and cleaned up after. He has been available for after-the-sale questions too. We are very happy.

reviews.author: Robert Dittmann
reviews.text: Muwonge did an excellent job. Very professional and reasonably priced. I highly recommend them. Could not have been nicer or done a better job. P.s. it was very cold out also!

reviews.author: carol jones
reviews.text: Ryan is fantastic. He is prompt, reasonable, and competent. His prices are fair, and his professionalism is refreshing.

reviews.author: Mark T. · Elgin, IL
reviews.text: Garage door spring broke and after some quotes I settled on Ryan Garage Door. He showed up within a few hours and did a quick & fantastic job at a great price — even included free maintenance on the door! I give Ryan a 1000% rating on the work and the reasonable pricing.

reviews.author: Angelique B.
reviews.text: Able to come out within 24 hours of reaching out after a major company did not show up. Service was great and he came prepared even with a part missing from the box. I 100% recommend Ryan Garage! Great price — other companies were overcharging to do the same job.

reviews.author: Kathryn S.
reviews.text: Ryan was wonderful! I have very old, unique garage doors that no other technician would attempt to repair. He understood how much we loved the doors and found a reliable solution. He will be my first call for any garage door needs.

reviews.author: Matthew C.
reviews.text: Quoted me a price up front. Showed up on time, even in a snow storm. Did the work efficiently and had the door working better than it has in the nearly 4 years we’ve lived in our house.

reviews.author: Claudia K.
reviews.text: Great experience with Ryan. My garage door would not go up and I had to leave my car out in freezing temperatures. He diagnosed the problem quickly and within an hour all was well. His price was fair and I would definitely call him again.

reviews.author: Janelle Ortiz
reviews.text: A lifesaver when our garage door got stuck halfway open, just days after bringing home our newborn. The team arrived the same afternoon, found a broken spring, fixed it, and checked everything else. They explained what went wrong in plain terms. Such a relief.
